ddls:
CREATE TABLE "heritage_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heritage site */,
  "structure_name" TEXT /* Name of the structure */,
  "list_no" INTEGER /* List number assigned to the site */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of listing (e.g., II, II*) */,
  "built_year" TEXT /* Year the site was built */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or annotations about the site */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* Detailed description of the site's historical importance */,
  "architectural_style" TEXT /* Architectural style of the site */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the site record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "architect" TEXT /* Name of the original architect or builder */,
  "ownership" TEXT /* Current owner of the site (e.g., private, government, community) */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Information about the site's accessibility (e.g., wheelchair accessible) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heritage_sites_grade FOREIGN KEY ("grade") REFERENCES site_grades ("grade_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the heritage site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the site */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the site is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the site is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the site is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site's location */,
  "post_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the site */,
  "nearest_town" TEXT /* Nearest town or city to the site */,
  "nearest_public_transport" TEXT /* Nearest public transport stop or station */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Area of land the site occupies in square meters */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES heritage_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade (e.g., II, II*) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  "legal_protection" TEXT /* Details of any legal protection or restrictions associated with the grade */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to determine the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heritage site the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., report, image, map) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  "document_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  "document_category" TEXT /* Category of the document (e.g., historical, technical, legal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_documents_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES heritage_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heritage site the image belongs to */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., photograph, diagram) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_author" TEXT /* Author of the image */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "copyright_status" TEXT /* Copyright status of the image (e.g., public domain, copyrighted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_images_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES heritage_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heritage site the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity (e.g., repair, restoration) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the activity */,
  "contractor" TEXT /* Name of the contractor who performed the activity */,
  "maintenance_supervisor" TEXT /* Supervisor of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_report" TEXT /* Detailed report of the maintenance activity */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance activity was completed */,
  "next_scheduled_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled date for maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_maintenance_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES heritage_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heritage site the inspection belongs to */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who performed the inspection */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the inspection was performed */,
  "condition_rating" TEXT /* Condition rating of the site (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the inspection */,
  "inspection_report" TEXT /* Detailed report of the inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled date for inspection */,
  "inspection_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the inspection in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_inspections_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES heritage_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the inspector (e.g., structural, historical) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the inspector */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications the inspector holds */,
  "inspector_status" TEXT /* Current status of the inspector (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conservator, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heritage site being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the site */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the site */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES heritage_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
